title: Artifacts in Claude Code: share your work as it happens
summary: Artifacts in Claude Code transforms raw output like data, mockups, and JSON into visual pages that teams can share and understand at a glance. The feature is available in beta on Team and Enterprise plans.
writeup: The video covers Artifacts in Claude Code, a feature that converts raw output such as data, mockups, and JSON into visual pages meant to be readable at a glance. It matters because the conversion targets team collaboration, turning intermediate work into something shareable rather than leaving it as raw text. The key takeaways: the feature emphasizes visualization of otherwise unstructured output, and it is available in beta on Team and Enterprise plans.
